title: Hard-code the device-mapper graph driver to disabled
body:
This follows similar changes to Podman in
https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/407354198169f33a1ebebca3ae47d5d0c34d9b42 and Buildah in
https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4832

Compare earlier #2161 .

(I didn’t actually _test_ any of the updated installation instructions.)

Cc: @giuseppe
